intro: Over 19 articles published between April 12 and April 26, 2026, ZCyberNews tracked 15 high-severity incidents tagged law-enforcement. Threat actors Scattered Spider, BlackCat (ALPHV), and W3LL were observed targeting government, telecommunications, cryptocurrency, law enforcement, and corporate sectors. Affected regions included the United States, Canada, North America, Europe, and Florida. The coverage mix also included three medium-severity and one informational report.
